testcase.name: @stynx-web/angular-trash > renders trash list rows, selection toolbar, and pagination through TestBed
@stynx-web/angular-trash > loads trash items and restores them through the adapter
@stynx-web/angular-trash > handles pagination, cascade restore, hard delete, and fallback errors
@stynx-web/angular-trash > ships a default SDK adapter provider and multiplexes configured kinds
@stynx-web/angular-trash > supports provider-backed components, tabs, filters, bulk actions, and retention countdowns
@stynx-web/angular-trash > falls back to per-item bulk operations and filters by the current session
@stynx-web/angular-trash > prunes stale selections, clears load errors, and preserves row fields
@stynx-web/angular-trash > honors default kind, selection/filter toggles, empty bulk guards, and missing adapters
@stynx-web/angular-trash > checks hard-delete permission names, invalid purge dates, and today countdowns
@stynx-web/angular-trash > does not cascade unrelated restore errors and preserves exact toast messages
